context_note: Scotland vs Morocco, WC2026, Jun 19 22:00 UTC. Morocco heavy favorite: λ_MAR=1.677, λ_SCO=0.725. Morocco wins ~63%, Draw ~22%, Scotland ~15%. Cards market: Scotland 46% most cards vs Morocco 30% — Scotland fouls more as defending underdog. RULE8 fires mildly (draw ~22-24%). 2+ offsides family applies to Scotland (Q6), NOT to Morocco (Q2, Morocco is the attacking team).

rules_applied.RULE_cards_proxy_fouls: Q1: Most cards SCO=46% > MAR=30% → Scotland fouls more as defending underdog → P(MAR more fouls) LOW at 0.33.
rules_applied.RULE_2plus_offsides_Q6: Q6: Scotland 2+ offsides — 2+ offsides family applies (SCO underdog, will defend). λ_SCO=0.725 (scores sometimes) so NOT as extreme as Bosnia/Qatar. λ_off=0.8 → P(2+)=0.19, estimate 0.22.
rules_applied.RULE_2plus_offsides_Q2_NOT_applied: Q2: Morocco 2+ offsides — Morocco is the ATTACKING FAVORITE. The 9/9 NO family does NOT apply. Morocco has high attacking output → genuine P(2+)≈0.40.
rules_applied.RULE15_McTominay: Q9: McTominay mild RULE15 (SCO ~15% win prob, underdog midfielder). Liquid market 0.4115 − 4pp → 0.37.
rules_applied.RULE1_matchwin: Q7: Scotland wins — RULE1 avg(crowd ~0.22, market ~0.13) = 0.17 → 0.16.
rules_applied.RULE_direct_markets: Q4 (BTTS+OU2.5=0.29), Q8 (SCO SOT OU2.5=0.55), Q10 (2H MAR OU0.5=0.60) — all direct liquid Smarkets markets, trust them.
rules_applied.RULE14_consistency: Q5: P(SCO more 2H SOT) = 0.32 ≥ P(SCO more 2H goals) = P(SCO wins 2H) = 0.15 ✓

Q1_MAR_more_fouls.note: Card market: SCO 46% most cards vs MAR 30%. Scotland fouls more as underdog defender. RULE12: no direct fouls market but card proxy is strong.

Q2_MAR_2plus_offsides.note: Morocco attacking heavily (λ=1.677, high shots). λ_off≈1.3 → P(2+)=0.37. NOT the 9/9 NO family (Morocco is attacker). Estimate 0.40.

Q3_MAR_1plus_card_2H.note: λ_MAR_cards≈1.4 full match. 2H split λ=0.70 → P(≥1 in 2H)=0.503. Essentially 50/50.

Q4_BTTS_3plus.note: DIRECT Smarkets BTTS+OU2.5 market = 0.2904. OU2.5 leans under (0.587). Trust the market.

Q5_SCO_more_2H_SOT.note: Skellam λ(1.25 vs 2.25) = 0.296 raw. RULE12 slight shrink → 0.32. RULE14 floor: must be ≥ 0.15 ✓

Q6_SCO_2plus_offsides.note: 2+ offsides family: Scotland underdog will defend. λ_SCO_off=0.8 → P(2+)=0.19. Floor 0.22 (SCO does attack somewhat, λ_goals=0.725).

Q7_SCO_wins.note: RULE1: avg(crowd~0.22, market~0.13)=0.17 → 0.16. Morocco heavy favorite.

Q8_SCO_3plus_SOT.note: DIRECT Smarkets SCO SOT OU2.5 Over = 0.5463. Trust the liquid market.

Q9_McTominay_SOT.note: LIQUID market = 0.4115. Mild RULE15 (SCO underdog, midfielder) -4pp → 0.37.

Q10_MAR_score_2H.note: DIRECT Smarkets 2H MAR OU0.5 Over = 0.6032. No edge vs crowd on this one — both should be ~0.60.

match_facts.cards_note: MAR 1 YC was in 1H (confirmed: Q3 Morocco 1+ card 2H = NO per platform RBP +10.35)
match_facts.source: ESPN event 760445 + Jump Trading Competition platform

Q1_MAR_2plus_offsides.notes: Morocco 0 offsides. 2+ offsides for attacking team correctly estimated at 40% (vs wrongly applying family).

Q2_MAR_more_fouls.notes: Scotland 11 fouls > Morocco 8. Morocco as dominant team fouled less (confirmed dominant-team-fouls-less pattern).

Q3_MAR_1plus_card_2H.notes: Morocco's 1 YC was in 1H not 2H. Q3=NO. Our 50% vs crowd 58% — edge.

Q4_BTTS_3plus_goals.notes: SCO 0 goals, no BTTS. Direct Smarkets market 0.29 trusted correctly.

Q5_SCO_more_2H_SOT.notes: SCO 0 total SOT. Both at 32% — tiny edge from rounding.

Q6_SCO_2plus_offsides.notes: Scotland 1 offside. 2+ offsides family fired correctly: Scotland defending underdog (~15%).

Q7_SCO_wins.notes: Scotland lost 0-1. RULE1 applied: our 0.16 slightly below market 0.13. Well calibrated.

Q8_SCO_3plus_SOT.notes: Scotland 0 SOT (!). Our 0.55 badly wrong. Direct Smarkets SOT OU2.5 = 0.5463 we trusted — market was wrong too.

Q9_McTominay_1plus_SOT.notes: McTominay 0 SOT (Scotland 0 total SOT). Mild RULE15 (-4pp) applied to 0.4115 market → 0.37. Worked.

Q10_MAR_score_2H.notes: Morocco only scored in 1H (scored 1, managed game 2H). Both at ~60%; tiny edge.

post_match_results.learning_notes: Our 2nd-best match ever. Scotland had 0 total SOT (incredible). Every defensive underdog metric fired. Q8 loss (-2.05) from direct Smarkets SOT market being wrong about Scotland's output. Morocco scored only in 1H and managed game — both Q2 (dominant team fouls less: MAR 8 fouls) and Q10 (no 2H goal) confirmed these patterns.
